content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad-based weakness with Nifty -0.85%, Bank Nifty -0.86%, Auto -1.41% and India VIX at elevated 16.84. However, IT and FMCG showing defensive rotation evidence (COFORGE +6.44%, DABUR +3.77%). My book of 15 positions is mostly in-the-money on a net basis with +₹7,810 unrealized, but with deployment already at 65% and 115 trading days left, focus today is position management — trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.8%, COFORGE +9.3%) ahead of CPI print Tuesday. No new entries warranted today given (a) high book diversity already, (b) macro caution, (c) multiple held positions still finding their footing.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +9.8% unrealized at ₹1091. Current SL 1073.10 is above CMP 1080 in the existing record (stale tick). Resetting SL to 1055 — sits ~3.3% below CMP 1091.20, respects Rule 14 trail-gap discipline (>1% below LTP), locks in roughly +7% gain vs entry 984. Q4 results beat (PAT +19% YoY), brokerage upgrades to ₹1350. Keeping target 1135 — close to original; will revisit if momentum continues. Trail-gap 36 pts / 3.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1330.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.3% with pre-market +6.44% spike to ₹1368. Current SL 1352 is dangerously close to/above prior tick CMP — needs reset. New SL 1330 sits ~2.8% below CMP 1368, respects 1% trail-gap floor. Raising target to 1450 to give IT defensive rotation room to run. Q4 PAT +135% YoY (incl one-time benefit), order book +16% YoY, AI-positioned Tier-2 leader. Trail locks in +5.6% vs entry 1259."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 810.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +1.2% at ₹831. Current SL 820 equals entry (flush with cost basis); CMP 831 is barely 1.3% above SL — too tight for normal FMCG noise and risks self-stopout. Loosening SL slightly to 810 (-1.2% from entry, ~2.6% below CMP) gives the position room while still capping loss. Q4 PAT +18% YoY, raised FY27 guidance, FMCG rotation in play (DABUR +3.77%, BERGEPAINT +5.63%). Note: this is a LOOSENING — engine may reject. If rejected, accept HOLD at SL 820."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -0.6% at ₹124.31, SL 121. Geopolitical hedge still intact; gold near consolidation but structural bull cycle continues per J.P. Morgan ETF forecast. SL has 2.7% room from CMP. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE -0.7% at ₹3051, SL 3000 (1.7% below CMP). Defense thesis intact — FY26 PAT +41.8%, ₹33,000 cr corvette L1, ₹17,000 cr order book. HAL results May 13 may lift defense sentiment. Holding at current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +1.8% at ₹836, SL 820 (1.9% below CMP). Record Q4 revenue, three investor meets May 15-27 as upcoming catalysts. SL placement reasonable; not trailing yet as gain is modest."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -1.4% at ₹1476. Q4 PAT +37% YoY, EBITDA margin +310bps, dividend ₹11.5. SL 1465 is 0.7% below CMP — tight but acceptable given strong fundamentals. CMP recovering pre-market +1.77%. Hold through to target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.2% at ₹1606, SL 1580 (1.6% below CMP). Q4 results were soft (Day-1 -3.84% underperformance), but pre-market shows strong recovery from yesterday's ₹1537 close to ₹1606. Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst intact. Holding at SL 1580."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF -0.3% at ₹2780, SL 2755 (0.9% below CMP). Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 PAT +47%, ₹2,300 cr refrigerants capex. Strong specialty-chem thesis. SL tight but acceptable; positions still close to entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -1.1% at ₹9083, SL 9020 (0.7% below CMP). Q4 revenue +27% record, ₹47 dividend, brokerage targets ₹9770-10500. Tight SL but Q4 momentum strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG -1.6% at ₹1989, SL 1955 (1.7% below CMP). Headline Q4 PAT -17% YoY but on ₹490 cr exceptional; clean operations strong. FY27 25% growth guide. Hold at SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -1.8% at ₹362, SL 354 (2.2% below CMP). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target ₹415 (18% upside). BFSI weak today but thesis solid. Hold at SL 354."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5% at ₹10711, SL 10440 (2.5% below CMP). Q4 PAT +34%, ₹5,633 cr buyback at ₹12,000, ₹150 dividend. Auto sector weak today but Bajaj's pre-market +1.00% on 3.1x volume is constructive. Hold at SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -0.4% at ₹487, SL 472 (3.1% below CMP). Q4 PAT +16% YoY, raised FY27 guidance to low-double-digit. Pre-market +3.77% on 1.3x volume. FMCG rotation playing out. Hold at SL 472; not yet at +2% to trail to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +0.5% at ₹1228, SL 1190 (3.1% below CMP). Q4 results pending in May (binary), Kotak Sell rating with ₹800 target is a warning. Pre-market +1.81% positive. Tight risk: monitor; hold for now but ready to exit if Q4 disappoints. Within Rule 11 binary-event watch — small position size is fine."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Lock in +7% gain; trail-gap 3.3% below CMP respects 1% floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1330.00, "reasoning": "Reset SL away from prior tick stale 1352; ~2.8% trail-gap below CMP 1368."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "MODIFY emitted but if engine rejects loosening, accept HOLD at SL 820."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge intact; SL has 2.7% room."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defense thesis intact; SL 1.7% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Gain modest; SL 1.9% below CMP; let investor meet catalysts play out."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL tight but fundamentals support."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong intraday recovery; Zaynich optionality."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Specialty chem thesis intact; SL 0.9% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 record; brokerage targets above CMP."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Clean operating Q4; FY27 guidance constructive."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "BFSI weak today but Q4 +30% PAT strong; SL 2.2% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback + dividend + Q4 +34% PAT support; pre-market +1% in weak auto sector."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG rotation in play; not yet at +2% to trail."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 results pending — monitor; small position absorbs binary risk."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH watchlist candidates evaluated but rejected today: (1) THERMAX +11.84% — gap-up too extended for chase entry, prefer pullback. (2) NUVAMA +10.65% — same chase-risk. (3) FINCABLES, PERSISTENT — cables/IT exposure already via POLYCAB and COFORGE, cluster discipline (Rule 10). (4) INFY — BEARISH research rating (-0.10) on AI-disruption overhang despite pre-market bounce, NO. (5) HCLTECH near 52w low — value trap risk; IT cluster cap. (6) BERGEPAINT — Q4 results May 12 within 1 session, Rule 11 binary-event block. (7) TITAN, APOLLOHOSP — quality names but book is already at 65% deployed with 14 cash positions; admitting more concentrates session risk before CPI print. (8) CRAFTSMAN 15x volume — unusual; flag but no chase without catalyst clarity. (9) PSUBNKBEES short — counter-trend bet on PSU bank weakness; INDIA VIX 16.84 too high for fresh MIS shorts. Will reassess THERMAX, NUVAMA, CRAFTSMAN tomorrow if they consolidate.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed, +0.78% today on unrealized basis (+₹7,810). Bigger concern: cumulative P&L only +0.60% over 22 days, 5-day window shows 12% win rate and 0.5x profit factor — clear evidence of premature exits / poor entry timing. Today's discipline: (a) trail winners (PNBHOUSING, COFORGE) with proper 1%+ trail-gap to avoid Day-10/12 forced-exit failure mode; (b) respect SLs on losers — let them work or fire, do NOT preemptively close (Rule 17, Day-12 lesson where 5 preemptive closes cost -₹5,101); (c) no new admits today given deployment at 65%, macro caution (Nifty -0.85% open, VIX 16.84), and Tuesday CPI print pending. HFCL open BUY order at ₹133.50 placed 7467m (~5 days) ago — STALE, will cancel separately as it's past relevance window. Note: SL update on MARICO is a loosening (820→810); engine will likely reject — acceptable, fallback is hold at 820."
}
